case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. CHRISTOPHER P. PAPAS-SBN 129593

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BY THE STATE BAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA SERVED APR-22-2008, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT PAPAS-SBN 129593, CHRISTOPHER P.
